message:
test(fcp-conformance/host-output-install): pin OutputCaptureConfig + BufferStats + InstallStatus + VerificationStatus + InstallOptions wire format (resolves flywheel_connectors-8awtd)

26 tests pinning 6 connector-install + output-capture primitives.
Zero prior coverage.

- OutputCaptureConfig 4 documented defaults: stdout_capacity=64 KiB,
  stderr_capacity=64 KiB, parse_json_lines=true, max_json_lines=100
- new()=default(); 4 with_* builders (with_stdout_capacity,
  with_stderr_capacity, with_json_parsing, with_max_json_lines)
  preserve other fields; serde roundtrip
- BufferStats 4-field roundtrip (len/capacity/total_written/has_overflow)
- InstallStatus 6 variants with payloads: NotInstalled / Installing /
  Installed / Failed{error} / Updating{from_version,to_version} /
  Uninstalling; full roundtrip per variant + 6 distinct + reject
  bogus
- VerificationStatus 4 variants: is_ok ⇔ {Verified, Unverified,
  Skipped} (Failed is the only NOT-ok); Failed carries reason; full
  roundtrip
- InstallOptions::default safe-minimum (all-false + None override —
  skip_signature=false MUST stay false for production safety)
- InstallStep::passed constructor + 4-field roundtrip

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
